info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' kAntO lazyati lazyeta Syani vA lazate lazet ' (Slo. 177) iti devaH  kAntiH = icCA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'lazapatapada..' (3.2.154) sUtre vfttO apalAzukaM vfzalasaNgatam ityudAharaRaM sTitam tatrApalazati nAmilazatItyevArTaH sandehAnAskannaH idaM tu sandihyate kartari tAcCIlye ukaYi vfzalasaNgatamapalAzukamiti kaTaM saNgacCeta ata evAsmABiH svakftO vyAkaraRacandrodaye'palAzuko vfzalasaNgatamiti pAWa UhitaH
